info.name: Verdant Energy Platform
info.description: Complete API collection for Verdant Energy Platform. Import verdant-environment.json as your environment before testing. Recommended test order: Health → Auth (Login) → Marketplace → Pricing → Contracts → Payments → Certificates → Meters → Disputes → Analytics → AI Services.
